npm install -g @pofky/appstore-connect-mcp

App Store Connect
in your terminal.

Ask your AI agent "is my app in review?" and get an answer. No browser tabs, no portal clicking. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client.

Get started (free) View source on GitHub

You already live in the terminal.

You're deep in code. You need to know if your build passed review, or what that 1-star review says, or how many downloads you got this week.

So you open App Store Connect. Log in. Navigate to the right app. Click through three screens. Copy the info. Switch back to your editor.

This MCP server removes all of that. Type a question in your AI agent, get the answer in the same window where you write code.

Ask in English. Get real data.

Your AI agent calls the App Store Connect API on your behalf. Here's what that looks like.

"List my apps"

Found 3 app(s):

- Tempo: Habit Builder (com.example.tempo)
  ID: 6834291057

- FocusFlow (com.example.focusflow)
  ID: 6812045893

- NightOwl Weather (com.example.nightowl)
  ID: 6798320417

"Is my app in review?"

Review Status for App 6834291057

Latest version: v2.3 (IOS)
State: Waiting for Review
Created: 2026-04-08

Your app is in the review queue.
It has not been picked up by a reviewer yet.

"Show me 1-star reviews"

Customer Reviews for App 6834291057 (3 shown)

★☆☆☆☆ Notifications stopped working
By happyUser42 - US - 2026-04-10
"Since the last update, I don't get reminders anymore..."

★☆☆☆☆ Crashes on iPad
By tabletFan - GB - 2026-04-09
"Opens fine on my iPhone but crashes on iPad Air..."

★★☆☆☆ Missing dark mode
By darkside99 - DE - 2026-04-07
"Great concept but using it at night burns my eyes..."

Five tools. Each one does its job.

list_apps

Returns every app in your App Store Connect account: name, bundle ID, SKU, platform. The starting point for everything else.

app_details

Full version history for an app: build status, release state, creation dates. See exactly which version is live, which is pending.

review_status

Is your app in review, waiting, approved, or rejected? Get the state plus human-readable context like "typical review time: 24-48 hours."

list_reviews PRO

Customer reviews filtered by star rating (1-5), sorted by newest, oldest, or rating. Filter by territory. See what users are actually saying.

sales_report PRO

Daily, weekly, or monthly download counts and revenue, broken down by territory and app. Know your numbers without opening a spreadsheet.

Other MCP servers exist. Most do too much.

Servers with 80 or 162 tools overwhelm AI agents with options. LLMs perform better when they have fewer, well-defined tools to choose from.

Server Tools Status Free tier
JoshuaRileyDev ~25 Archived N/A
STOMP 162 Active No
mcp-asc 80+ Active No
This one 5 Active Yes

Setup takes 3 minutes.

1. Create an API key

Go to App Store Connect > Keys. Create a key with Admin or App Manager role. Download the .p8 file.

2. Install

npm install -g @pofky/appstore-connect-mcp

3. Add to your MCP config

Add this to ~/.claude/settings.json (or your agent's MCP config):

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "appstore-connect": {
      "command": "appstore-connect-mcp",
      "env": {
        "ASC_KEY_ID": "YOUR_KEY_ID",
        "ASC_ISSUER_ID": "YOUR_ISSUER_ID",
        "ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH": "~/.appstore/AuthKey_XXXX.p8"
      }
    }
  }
}

4. Ask your agent

Type "List my App Store Connect apps" in Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or Cline. That's it.

Your credentials never leave your machine.

  • ✓ The .p8 private key is read locally. JWT tokens are generated on your computer.
  • ✓ API calls go directly from your machine to api.appstoreconnect.apple.com. No proxy.
  • ✓ The license server (Pro tier) sees only your license key string. Zero Apple data, zero credentials.
  • ✓ Fully open source. Read the code.

Pricing

Free

No account needed

$0

  • ✓ list_apps
  • ✓ app_details
  • ✓ review_status

Pro

Customer reviews + sales data

$9/mo

  • ✓ Everything in Free
  • ✓ list_reviews (filter by rating, territory, sort)
  • ✓ sales_report (daily/weekly/monthly by territory)
  • → Coming: respond to reviews, TestFlight management, financial reports
Get Pro

Works with

Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf / Cline / any MCP client

Stop switching tabs.

Install in one command. Free tier covers review status, app listing, and version details. Upgrade when you need reviews and sales data.

npm install -g @pofky/appstore-connect-mcp
